def negative_opentelemetry_span_attribute_attaches_pii_fields():
    rule_id = "opentelemetry_span_attribute_attaches_pii_fields"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "OpenTelemetry span attribute set to a key that likely carries PII such as email, phone, or IP address."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
